The '''Hapes Transit Authority''' was the traffic control agency that monitored as well as directed the vast amount of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic around [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]. It handled roughly 2,000 starships per [[Standard day/Legends|day]].
